programme.title: The Big Questions
programme.desc: Nicky Campbell presents moral and religious discussions on topical issues, with contributions by members of the studio audience at Oasis Academy MediaCityUK in Salford(n)

programme.title: Wanted Down Under
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness, his wife Erin and their two children sample life in Melbourne for a week, hoping the move would improve their work-life balance and quality of family time(n)

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Ben Cooper and Tim Weeks offer advice to two teams at the Highland Centre in Edinburgh, while presenter Natasha Raskin Sharp pays a visit to a camera obscura in the city(n)

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Sean Fletcher looks at faith and autism, meeting a minister with Asperger's syndrome and hearing from members of the world's first performing autistic adult choir(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson goes property hunting in rural Wiltshire with a couple who have £950,000 to buy a family home with land, where they and their young children can enjoy a self-sufficient lifestyle. Jules also takes time out to find out about the county's glove-making heritage and sees some famous examples made for famous figures(n)

programme.title: Live Six Nations Rugby Union
programme.desc: France v Italy (Kick-off 3.00pm). Gabby Logan presents coverage of the concluding match from the second round of fixtures, held at Stade de France. The hosts will be in confident mood after their impressive performance against England in their opening match, while Italy were comfortably routed by Wales. The French prevailed 25-14 in Italy last year to extend their winning run against the Azzurri in this competition to six matches. With analysis from Thomas Castaignede, Sergio Parisse and Joe Worsley, and commentary by Eddie Butler, Jonathan Davies and Paul O'Connell(n)

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: In Cwmcarn, south Wales, Kim and Simon's steep garden is little more than three huge, muddy tiers, so Charlie Dimmock and Chelsea gold medal-winners Harry and David Rich set out to turn it into a relaxing space worthy of the area's amazing views(n)

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Matt Baker, Charlotte Smith and Steve Brown head to the Auchlyne Estate near Killin in Perthshire, the first of four visits they will be making over the next year to chart life there throughout the seasons. Plus, Tom Heap goes back to the classroom to see if the next generation of farmers are being given the training they need(n)

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: From ancient Syria to present day Sheffield and out into the wilds of space, something is stalking the Doctor and her friends. As Graham, Yaz and Ryan return home to see friends and family, they find themselves haunted by very different experiences. Who is the figure calling from beyond the stars for help, and what are the fearsome Chagaskas terrorising Aleppo in 1380? To find the answers, the Doctor and her companions must embark on a mission that forces them to face their darkest fears(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: At the Turners, Shelagh receives a phone call from the Hong Kong adoption agency, which has the alarming news that someone from May's past has arrived in the UK and wants to see the little girl. Meanwhile, Valerie's cousin Maureen is heavily pregnant and hoping her baby will be born on Thursday, the same date as her father and grandfather. However, her due date isn't so soon and keen to bring on the birth, Maureen takes a big risk by secretly taking castor oil - with potentially disastrous consequences(n)

programme.title: The Pale Horse
programme.desc: Widowed antique dealer Mark Easterbrook investigates when his name appears on a list found in the shoe of a dead woman, and his enquiries lead him to the home of three spinsters in Much Deeping. The village is a place of old traditions, macabre rituals and strange beliefs, a place of witches, curses and spells, and as more deaths occur Mark starts to fear for his own life and sanity. First of a two-part adaptation of Agatha Christie's 1961 novel, starring Rufus Sewell, Sean Pertwee and Kaya Scodelario(n)

programme.title: Match of the Day 2
programme.desc: Mark Chapman reviews the day's Premier League action, featuring Manchester City v West Ham United at Etihad Stadium and Sheffield United v Bournemouth at Bramall Lane. West Ham were looking to avenge a 5-0 thrashing at the hands of the Citizens on the opening weekend of the season, while Sheffield United were aiming to continue their impressive campaign back in the top flight by inflicting more misery upon the struggling Cherries(n)

programme.title: The Women's Football Show
programme.desc: Highlights of the weekend's games in the Super League, featuring Everton v Liverpool at Goodison Park, Arsenal v Tottenham Hotspur at Meadow Park and Birmingham City v Brighton & Hove Albion at Damson Park(n)

programme.title: Wanted Down Under
programme.desc: The Hornetts sample a week in Brisbane and while Simon has dreamt of making it his home, his wife Joanna has strong emotional ties to the UK that she would find very hard to break(n)

programme.desc: Enforcement officers check hygiene standards in Oxford takeaways while in Studley, Warwickshire, they crack down on a butcher claiming meat was British when it came from overseas(n)

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: A bedridden Jake falls for Willow and finds himself peddling her brand of snake oil, while things might be hotting up between Bear and Ayesha(n)

programme.desc: Frank and Lu are hired to investigate a fire at an award-winning salon, with owner Odette convinced that her old friend and now rival Isobel is behind the blaze and a number of other acts of sabotage. Guest starring Sally Lindsay and Jacqueline Boatswain(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin helps a couple looking for a home in Oxfordshire on a budget of £1.5 million, and also braves the county's waters during an exhilarating attempt at punt racing(n)

programme.title: The Farmers' Country Showdown

programme.title: Getaways
programme.desc: Holly Hamilton and JJ Chalmers explore the Greek island of Crete, kicking off in the capital of Heraklion, where they visit a 13th-century fort and sample the traditional Greek pastry boukatsa. Moving on, they also check out the famous beaches, the 10-mile samaria Gorge and a museum specialising in football shirts. In the Short Getaway, actress and comedian Diona Doherty is in Co Longford to road test CenterParcs, one of Ireland's newest family attractions(n)

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Callum prepares for his assessment and gets much-needed reassurance from Karen and Stuart - only to be thrown by the arrival of an unexpected visitor. Linda and Mick put on a united front with the social worker, and Sonia invites Whitney on a weekend away - unaware Leo is eavesdropping from the attic. Bobby suggests that Bex should move in with him, Iqra and Habiba, and Rainie gives Daniel a piece of her mind about his fake funeral plans(n)

programme.title: Panorama
programme.desc: Callie Lewis was just 24 when she took her own life. She had been in the care of the NHS, but fell through the cracks of an understaffed and overstretched system. For the last 16 months, Panorama has been filming with her family as they tried to understand what went wrong. Shortly before she died, they learned that Callie was a member of an online suicide forum, where she found detailed advice on how to kill herself. As reporter Ellie Flynn discovers, Callie's death comes at a time when many people with mental health issues continue to complain about their struggle to connect with the services they need(n)

programme.title: Rio and Kate: Becoming a Stepfamily
programme.desc: Documentary following former England captain Rio Ferdinand and his fiancee Kate Wright in the months leading up to their wedding as she integrates into the family and becomes a stepmother to his three children Lorenz, Tate and Tia. Kate takes on not only the role as Rio's new partner, but also of parent to three children still grieving over the death of their mother Rebecca in 2015 and grandmother Janet two years later(n)

programme.title: Lonesome
programme.desc: Singers Jordan Mogey and Andy Calderwood are united by a passion for country and gospel music, but also share a history of alcohol and drug abuse. They discuss their battle with addiction, and how music and faith have helped them to turn their lives around(n)

programme.title: True North
programme.desc: Documentary following 31-year-old Louise Welsh as she prepares for the end of her boxing career and contemplates life away from the ring(n)

programme.title: Ladhood
programme.desc: Liam lies to Jess about missing his mental-health assessment and tensions in their relationship reach breaking point, leaving him suddenly nostalgic for the simplicity of first love(n)

programme.title: A Question of Sport
programme.desc: Olympic 400m gold medallist Christine Ohuruogu, Cricket World Cup-winner Mark Wood, Sheffield United striker Billy Sharp and Great Britain swimming star Fran Halsall join team captains Matt Dawson and Phil Tufnell and host Sue Barker on the quiz(n)

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The host greets Hollywood star Mark Ruffalo, who is currently appearing in new legal thriller Dark Waters. Friends star David Schwimmer and British comedian and writer Nick Mohammed discuss their new spy comedy Intelligence. Episodes star Tamsin Greig also appears to talk about her role in Julian Fellowes' new period drama, Belgravia. Plus, there's music from singer-songwriter Alicia Keys, who performs her new single Underdog, while more intrepid audience members attempt to recount an anecdote from the dreaded red chair(n)

programme.title: Ainsley's Caribbean Kitchen
programme.desc: Ainsley Harriott takes a culinary tour of Grenada, where he prepares pork with sweet potato mash and nutmeg cream sauce, and discovers why the spice is so important to the island. He also visits a rum distillery powered by a water wheel and makes a cocktail using a local chocolate liquor, and gets introduced to Grenada's national dish by chef Brian Benjamin(n)

programme.title: Living on the Veg
programme.desc: Henry Firth and Ian Theasby serve up their Thai 'no fish' cakes and demonstrate how to turn meat-free sausages into smoky chorizo for a piri piri traybake. Michelin-starred chef Alexis Gauthier shows how he has transformed a classic French pate into a vegan 'faux gras', there are ideas for healthy smoothies and, for dessert, no-egg mini banoffee meringues with cashew cream and caramel sauce(n)

programme.title: The Greek Islands with Julia Bradbury
programme.desc: Julia arrives in the Dodecanese, a far-flung group of islands at the gateway between Europe and the East. On the largest. Rhodes, she uncovers a treasure of trove of Byzantine art and has masterclass in painting historic frescoes. Travelling inland to the mountain village of Apollona, she meets some female entrepreneurs producing an age-old superfood made from honey and sesame. Julia's trip ends with a visit to the neighbouring island of Symi where, after sampling the local shrimps, she receives a lesson in the ancient and dangerous skill of sponge diving(n)

programme.title: The Voice UK
programme.desc: The penultimate round of the blind auditions in the spinning-chair singing contest, in which celebrity 'coaches' will.i.am, Olly Murs, Tom Jones and Meghan Trainor seek out the nation's best vocal talent. The coveted spaces on the coaches' teams are filling up and as ever, there is a simple twist to the auditions - with the four coaches selecting their teams without being able to see them, looks play no part in the selection process, meaning each singer is chosen on vocal ability alone(n)

programme.title: The Masked Singer
programme.desc: Joel Dommett hosts the semi-final of the celebrity singing contest. Duck, Fox, Hedgehog, Octopus and Queen Bee are the five remaining singers and this week two more will be unmasked and eliminated, leaving only three to go through to next week's final. Ken Jeong returns to the panel, joining regulars Rita Ora, Jonathan Ross and Davina McCall in trying to guess the famous faces are behind the costumes(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets (2016)
programme.desc: When rivalry leaves them cast adrift on the streets of New York, two bickering hounds must put their differences aside and pull together. Animated adventure from the makers of Despicable Me, featuring the voices of Louis CK, Eric Stonestreet and Kevin Hart(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Ruth Davidson, Mark King, Ferne McCann and Dan Walker pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds for charity. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Dancing on Ice
programme.desc: The celebrities and their professional partners take to the arena once more, performing routines based on a selection of different dance style. Kevin Kilbane won't be among them, having lost out in last week's skate-off to H. Which of tonight's celebrities will find themselves in the bottom two? Presented by Phillip Schofield and Holly Willoughby(n)

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: As Morse sees in 1970 at a Venetian opera, Thursday and the team are faced with a grisly murder on an Oxford towpath. Back in Oxford, Morse meets a kindred spirit, while a ground-breaking college project becomes a fatal battle of the sexes. Shaun Evans stars as the cerebral detective, in an episode he also directed, with Roger Allam, Anton Lesser and Sean Rigby(n)

programme.title: The Food and Drink Awards in Association with Staysure and thefoodawards.com
programme.desc: Stephen Fry hosts this event from the Merchant Taylors' Hall in London celebrating the UK's position as one of the world's leaders in food and drink, which has risen to an all-time high in the past few years. Awards include best organic producer, best family run restaurant and outstanding achievement, while contributors include Jeni Barnett, Andi Oliver, Linda Robson, Rosemary Shrager and Tom Read Wilson(n)

programme.title: Bradley Walsh & Son: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Bradley is on the mend following his rodeo injury and determined to get back behind the wheel of the RV. As the pair continue on their journey, Barney is thrilled to be celebrating his birthday with a trip to the iconic Niagara Falls. Later, Bradley and Barney take the RV on a small cargo ferry as they head to Vermont. Here, the pair have a go at ice climbing, which proves treacherous for them and the crew, before a spot of dog sledding through the frozen wilderness and an inevitable race through the forests(n)

programme.title: Six Nations Highlights

programme.title: Liar
programme.desc: Terrified of being arrested, Andrew enlists Luke's help to set up an alibi, but Laura does not give up easily and the final confrontation between the two may have violent consequences. The concluding part of Harry and Jack Williams' thriller, which followed the lives of teacher Laura Nielson and widowed surgeon Andrew Earlham after they found themselves entangled in a web of deceit and confusion after enjoying a date together. Starring Joanne Froggatt and Ioan Gruffudd, with Danny Webb and Shelley Conn(n)

programme.title: Teach My Pet to Do That
programme.desc: Animal lover, comedian and presenter Alexander Armstrong opens the doors of his multispecies pet training school, to welcome miniature American shepherd dog Boomer and Stinky the pony, in the hope they can learn to retrieve and return a ringing mobile phone to their owner's hand. The star pet is Charlie the boxer, who sprung to fame by bouncing on a trampoline in a department store TV advertisement. programme.desc: Adam comes out on top, but his excitement is short-lived when reality hits, while Karen is put in an impossible position. programme.title: The BRITs at 40
programme.desc: Jack Whitehall narrates a look back at the history of the awards ceremony, featuring archive footage of some of the most memorable moments, from Oasis and Blur's rivalry to Stormzy's attack on the government, and classic performances by Adele, Rihanna and Drake. The programme also recalls less successful moments, from the infamous 1989 ceremony hosted by Mick Fleetwood and Sam Fox, and Madonna struggles with her cape. Featuring interviews with stars including Robbie Williams, Mel B, Mick Fleetwood, Little Mix, Sam Smith, Ellie Goulding, Sharon Osbourne, Bros, Dua Lipa, Rick Astley and Tom Jones(n)

programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents(n)

programme.title: Inside the Crown: Secrets of the Royals
programme.desc: The documentary explores how the Queen has responded in times of sadness and grief, as she faced personal tragedies and national disasters including the Aberfan disaster, the Grenfell fire, and the IRA's murder of Lord Mountbatten. The Queen also faced her so-called 'Annus Horribilis' in 1992, when family scandal, press ridicule and the catastrophic Windsor Castle fire tested her skills as monarch and mother to the limit, and, of course the death of Diana, Princess of Wales, when her slow response to the nation's grief threatened to destabilise the monarchy(n)

programme.title: White House Farm
programme.desc: With the testimony of a vital witness confirming some of Stan and Mick's suspicions, Taff still remains unconvinced, but the police are now forced to question what they thought they knew previously, and pursue the case against Jeremy. Six-part drama based on the true story of the mass murder of a family in an Essex farmhouse in August 1985, providing a fresh insight into these tragic events. Starring Mark Addy, Alexa Davies, Freddie Fox and Tom Christian(n)

programme.desc: Weasel tends to Fizz's toothache, but Magoo turns up, thinking he's busting into an animal testing lab.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr. Bean becomes obsessed with gaming after being introduced by Mrs. Wicket's nephew. He decides he must have his own console!(n)

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.desc: Po and the students encounter a gang who want to fight Po, which leads them to discovering Jindiao's evil plan.(n)

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: Craig of the Creek follows a young boy and his two friends as they go on adventures in a world of untamed, kid-dominated wilderness in the creek(n)

programme.title: Ainsley's Caribbean Kitchen
programme.desc: Ainsley Harriott takes a culinary tour of Grenada, where he prepares pork with sweet potato mash and nutmeg cream sauce, and discovers why the spice is so important to the island. He also visits a rum distillery powered by a water wheel and makes a cocktail using a local chocolate liquor, and gets introduced to Grenada's national dish by chef Brian Benjamin(n)

programme.title: Living on the Veg
programme.desc: Henry Firth and Ian Theasby serve up their Thai 'no fish' cakes and demonstrate how to turn meat-free sausages into smoky chorizo for a piri piri traybake. Michelin-starred chef Alexis Gauthier shows how he has transformed a classic French pate into a vegan 'faux gras', there are ideas for healthy smoothies and, for dessert, no-egg mini banoffee meringues with cashew cream and caramel sauce(n)

programme.title: The Greek Islands with Julia Bradbury
programme.desc: Julia arrives in the Dodecanese, a far-flung group of islands at the gateway between Europe and the East. On the largest. Rhodes, she uncovers a treasure of trove of Byzantine art and has masterclass in painting historic frescoes. Travelling inland to the mountain village of Apollona, she meets some female entrepreneurs producing an age-old superfood made from honey and sesame. Julia's trip ends with a visit to the neighbouring island of Symi where, after sampling the local shrimps, she receives a lesson in the ancient and dangerous skill of sponge diving(n)

programme.title: The Voice UK
programme.desc: The penultimate round of the blind auditions in the spinning-chair singing contest, in which celebrity 'coaches' will.i.am, Olly Murs, Tom Jones and Meghan Trainor seek out the nation's best vocal talent. The coveted spaces on the coaches' teams are filling up and as ever, there is a simple twist to the auditions - with the four coaches selecting their teams without being able to see them, looks play no part in the selection process, meaning each singer is chosen on vocal ability alone(n)

programme.title: The Masked Singer
programme.desc: Joel Dommett hosts the semi-final of the celebrity singing contest. Duck, Fox, Hedgehog, Octopus and Queen Bee are the five remaining singers and this week two more will be unmasked and eliminated, leaving only three to go through to next week's final. Ken Jeong returns to the panel, joining regulars Rita Ora, Jonathan Ross and Davina McCall in trying to guess the famous faces are behind the costumes(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets (2016)
programme.desc: When rivalry leaves them cast adrift on the streets of New York, two bickering hounds must put their differences aside and pull together. Animated adventure from the makers of Despicable Me, featuring the voices of Louis CK, Eric Stonestreet and Kevin Hart(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Ruth Davidson, Mark King, Ferne McCann and Dan Walker pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds for charity. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Dancing on Ice
programme.desc: The celebrities and their professional partners take to the arena once more, performing routines based on a selection of different dance style. Kevin Kilbane won't be among them, having lost out in last week's skate-off to H. Which of tonight's celebrities will find themselves in the bottom two? Presented by Phillip Schofield and Holly Willoughby(n)

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: As Morse sees in 1970 at a Venetian opera, Thursday and the team are faced with a grisly murder on an Oxford towpath. Back in Oxford, Morse meets a kindred spirit, while a ground-breaking college project becomes a fatal battle of the sexes. Shaun Evans stars as the cerebral detective, in an episode he also directed, with Roger Allam, Anton Lesser and Sean Rigby(n)

programme.title: The Food and Drink Awards in Association with Staysure and thefoodawards.com
programme.desc: Stephen Fry hosts this event from the Merchant Taylors' Hall in London celebrating the UK's position as one of the world's leaders in food and drink, which has risen to an all-time high in the past few years. Awards include best organic producer, best family run restaurant and outstanding achievement, while contributors include Jeni Barnett, Andi Oliver, Linda Robson, Rosemary Shrager and Tom Read Wilson(n)

programme.title: Bradley Walsh & Son: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Bradley is on the mend following his rodeo injury and determined to get back behind the wheel of the RV. As the pair continue on their journey, Barney is thrilled to be celebrating his birthday with a trip to the iconic Niagara Falls. Later, Bradley and Barney take the RV on a small cargo ferry as they head to Vermont. Here, the pair have a go at ice climbing, which proves treacherous for them and the crew, before a spot of dog sledding through the frozen wilderness and an inevitable race through the forests(n)

programme.title: Six Nations Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the second round of fixtures, featuring France v Italy at Stade de France, Ireland v Wales at Aviva Stadium and Scotland v England at Murrayfield(n)

programme.title: Liar
programme.desc: Terrified of being arrested, Andrew enlists Luke's help to set up an alibi, but Laura does not give up easily and the final confrontation between the two may have violent consequences. The concluding part of Harry and Jack Williams' thriller, which followed the lives of teacher Laura Nielson and widowed surgeon Andrew Earlham after they found themselves entangled in a web of deceit and confusion after enjoying a date together. Starring Joanne Froggatt and Ioan Gruffudd, with Danny Webb and Shelley Conn(n)

programme.title: Teach My Pet to Do That
programme.desc: Animal lover, comedian and presenter Alexander Armstrong opens the doors of his multispecies pet training school, to welcome miniature American shepherd dog Boomer and Stinky the pony, in the hope they can learn to retrieve and return a ringing mobile phone to their owner's hand. The star pet is Charlie the boxer, who sprung to fame by bouncing on a trampoline in a department store TV advertisement. The programme's trainers hit the road to help train Elvis the goat to be the star of a doggy agility show(n)

programme.desc: Bethany warns Alya that Ray is probably trying to get her into bed, an exhausted David crashes while taking the kids to the school play, and Eileen calls in the factory, hoping to apply for the Customer Services job(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Having downloaded Ray's legal files, Bethany and Daniel find a list of names including Michelle's with an asterisk next to them. David, Max and Lily extract themselves from the car wreckage, while Eileen and Alina are interviewed for the Underworld job(n)

programme.title: The Ellen DeGeneres Show
programme.desc: The host is joined by award-winning actress Julia Louis-Dreyfus, who discusses starring alongside Will Ferrell in Downhill(n)

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a revival of the supermarket-based game show in which three pairs of shoppers go wild in the aisles to win a £3,000 prize(n)

programme.title: Dinner Date
programme.desc: Jess from Essex picks three blind dates from five potential partners, based entirely on the menus they have created. When the three dinners have been eaten, she decides who she wants to see again(n)

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: In Manchester, Jason, Nathan and Jake all hope to impress hotel bookings agent Olivia with their style choices(n)

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a comical selection of mishaps filmed by viewers, featuring performing tots, a countdown of five teenagers in pain and the familiar line-up of crazy animals, below-the-belt mishaps and practical jokes(n)

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a selection of camcorder calamities and viewers' mobile-phone footage, featuring mums' unusual antics, workmen messing about and comical dance performances(n)

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill presents more hilarious home videos sent in by the public. This edition features cute kids, merry mishaps, silly seniors and animals that just cannot get along(n)

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Comedian Harry Hill narrates a selection of camcorder calamities and viewers' mobile-phone footage, including comical bird clips, unlikely insurance claims and macho men(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Walden has a breakdown when he and Zoey split up, taking his anger out on Alan, Robin and business partner Billy, before using a dog he finds on the beach to get even with his ex-girlfriend at Ava's birthday party. Starring Ashton Kutcher, Jon Cryer and Angus T Jones(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Walden begins to feel his age when his friend's daughter Missi (guest star Miley Cyrus) pays a visit, but his problems seem to disappear after Jake shows up unexpectedly. Starring Ashton Kutcher and Angus T Jones(n)

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Relationship-based reality show in which singletons seeking a romance compete in the hope of finding love - and winning a £50,000 prize(n)

programme.title: Don't Hate the Playaz
programme.desc: Maya Jama, Michael Dapaah and London Hughes go up against Lady Leshurr, Natasia Demetriou and NSG as they go head to head in rap battles, dance-offs and freestyling challenges. Jordan Stephens hosts, with help from DJ Shortee Blitz on the decks(n)

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Mayor West marries Lois's sister and the pair move into the Griffin family home, where he becomes Peter's best friend. However, not everyone welcomes the new arrivals, and Stewie takes over Chris's room after being evicted from his own(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Rigsby imagines he is rich after being left a sizeable sum in his uncle's will. But there is a condition attached - and the landlord has to seek Miss Jones's help if he has any hope of seeing the money. Andrew Sachs guest stars, with Leonard Rossiter and Frances de la Tour(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: In a bid to find true love, Rigsby puts a personal advertisement in the local paper and receives an unexpected reply. Leonard Rossiter, Frances de la Tour and Don Warrington star(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Geoff recruits Yasmeen to assist in his magic act. Roy and Carla realise that Nina is homeless. A parcel arrives for Rita that inspires an impromptu trip to Blackpool(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Arthur makes a shocking confession, Rhona takes matters into her own hands, and Laurel receives some alarming news(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth finds himself in interesting company as English socialites and American millionaires rub shoulders on board a train bound for the French Riviera. Passengers include oil magnate Rufus Van Aldin (Elliott Gould) and his daughter Ruth (Jaime Murray) - to whom he has given a magnificent ruby known as the Heart of Fire. With members of the aristocracy crammed into a confined space with their husbands, lovers and a renowned gemstone, murder cannot be far away. With Lindsay Duncan, Roger Lloyd Pack and James D'Arcy(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Richard Abernethie is found dead shortly after disinheriting his sole heir and specifying that his legacy is to be divided equally among the remaining family members. Poirot is called in by his solicitor friend Gilbert Entwhistle, to ascertain whether the late Mr Abernethie met with foul play - and also finds time to investigate the murder of a beneficiary under the new terms of the will. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with Robert Bathurst, Anna Calder-Marshall and Geraldine James(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Wealthy industrialist Sir Reuben Astwell is murdered after making a deal to sell synthetic rubber to the Germans, leaving the dapper sleuth wondering whether the motive was commercial or political. Evidence found in his chemical factory could hold the key to the mystery - but Poirot is unsure if the victim's widow can be trusted. Starring David Suchet, with Ann Bell and Bill Wallis(n)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: An American female bishop visiting St Gerard's College is found dead after drinking poisoned wine, and when another two killings occur, both mirroring macabre murders from Jacobean revenge tragedy, it appears the culprit is targeting candidates in the election to become vice-regent. However, when Innocent learns one of the suspects is hiding a dark secret, Lewis and Hathaway realise the motive is much more twisted. Guest starring Sian Phillips and Ronald Pickup, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox(n)

programme.title: The Cruise
programme.desc: Life on board with the 1,400 crew who live and work for up to nine months a year on luxury cruise ship the Regal Princess. As an 11-day voyage from Copenhagen to St Petersburg gets under way, some of the guests are vying for the award of most travelled passenger, while new dancer Dulcie is hoping to make the grade as part of the entertainment team. Narrated by Hugh Bonneville(n)

programme.title: The Cruise
programme.desc: Captain Ed Perrin has been given permission to sail his vessel all the way into Stockholm through its stunning archipelago. It's a terrifying task for the skipper, for if he gets it wrong he could cause untold damage to a nearby historic windmill or even run aground. Injury strikes the entertainment team, leaving dancer Dulcie paired with a new recruit who doesn't know the routines, and a safety helmet causes problems for excursions agent Timothy and his perfectly styled hair. Narrated by Hugh Bonneville(n)

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's India
programme.desc: Joanna Lumley travels back to the country of her birth, travelling the length and breadth of India to explore its diverse landscapes and cultural traditions. In this episode, her epic journey begins in Tamil Nadu, where she witnesses religious ceremonies in glorious temples, before visiting Gangtok in Sikkim, the place where her mother lived as a child(n)

programme.title: The Good Karma Hospital
programme.desc: Ruby encounters new challenges as a blistering heatwave hits Kerala, while Lydia decides she is ready for her first solo night shift. But when a storm hits Barco, Ruby faces an agonising test that stretches her medical skills to the limits. Return of the medical drama set in southern Indian, starring Amrita Acharia and Amanda Redman(n)

programme.title: The Good Karma Hospital
programme.desc: Lydia discovers that a former patient is in the care of a herbal doctor and is determined to win back her patient's trust. Meanwhile, Ruby and Gabriel treat a patient with a mystery condition - and Gabriel reveals something about his past. Drama, starring Amanda Redman, Amrita Acharia and James Krishna Floyd(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: While working with the drug squad, Ronnie and Joe find a skeleton that has been hidden inside the boot of a car in the River Thames. It turns out to be the remains of Taylor Kane, an undercover policeman who went missing in the 1980s - around the time of the Brixton riots. Through clever detection, unsettling evidence is unearthed and the team knows it must raise issues the police would rather forget. Drama, starring Bradley Walsh and Ben Bailey Smith, and featuring one of the last performances by Roger Lloyd-Pack, who died in January(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The hunt for the killer of a seemingly innocent family man brings Ronnie into contact with his old boss, former DI Natalie Chandler, whose father is accused of the crime. She wastes no time in persuading the detective to go above and beyond the call of duty to exonerate her dad and find the real culprit - even if that means getting him into trouble with an increasingly frustrated Wes. Drama, starring Bradley Walsh and Ben Bailey Smith, with Harriet Walter, Martin Jarvis and Roy Hudd(n)

programme.title: The Halcyon
programme.desc: Lady Hamilton wants Freddie to use his leave from the RAF to support her with the hotel and it becomes clear she wants to make changed and that Garland is in her sights. The hotel manager insists he's not worried and that he just needs to show how indispensable he is, but Peggy and Feldman aren't so sure, while Charity meets Joe and reveals her plans for revenge, but he refuses to help her, and Emma and Betsey hit the town. Drama, starring Olivia Williams, Steven Mackintosh, Jamie Blackley and Mark Benton(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Arthur makes a shocking confession, Rhona takes matters into her own hands, and Laurel receives some alarming news(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: New tenant Ambrose bamboozles Rigsby by claiming to be a mystic, and soon has the other lodgers under a strange spell. Leonard Rossiter, Frances de la Tour and Don Warrington star(n)

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Helping Curly takes Raquel's mind off Des, but Watts is horrified when sexual harassment complaints are filed against him. Steve hopes to win Fiona over with a bunch of flowers(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Raquel tries to comfort Curly and sends him to the Job Centre. Charlie returns and he is desperate to speak to Bet. Andy celebrates getting a place on a Combined Studies course(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jack meets Sarah in York to try for a reconciliation. Zak Dingle confronts Ned outside the pub, and the headmaster tells Angharad to find another school for Luke(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The Glovers plead with Ned not to go through with the fight. Betty accepts Seth's proposal, as long as her dad agrees. Frank organises a party for Chris and Kathy's anniversary(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Despite Rob's efforts to keep his wedding secret, his sisters enlist the help of the community to organise a surprise reception as the policeman prepares to marry Helen. A man's complaint about noisy neighbours turns sour when his mentally ill wife takes matters into her own hands, and Gina learns Jack's nude painting of her is to go on public display. Drama, with Jonathan Kerrigan and Sophie Ward(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: The first episode of the whimsical rural drama based on HE Bates' novels. Tax collector Cedric Charlton visits the Larkin household intent on getting the head of the family - Pop - to correctly fill out his tax forms. In so doing he falls for attractive daughter Mariette. Starring David Jason, Pam Ferris and Catherine Zeta-Jones(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A rehearsal of an amateur operatic production ends with Morse being arrested on suspicion of murder and suspended from duty pending further investigation. Stripped of official powers, he fights to clear his name - unaware he has been pencilled in as the real killer's next target. Guest starring Ian McDiarmid, with John Thaw and Kevin Whately(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Aidensfield's policemen struggle to deduce who could be behind a spate of sheep rustling, while Peggy is intrigued by an eco-warrior couple's slurry-fuelled generator. Helen is called in after the body of an elderly woman is found in the river, while the dead woman's son finds it difficult to deal with the consequences of his mother's demise. Drama, starring Jonathan Kerrigan and Sophie Ward(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Frank tells Kim about the suspicious noises coming from Mill Cottage. Ned plans to go ahead with the fight despite family protests. Alan unveils his home brew at the Woolpack(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Scott is grounded for stealing fireworks, Caroline invites Eric to the Tates' bonfire, Jack tells Ned he is scared he might lose Sarah, and Luke apologises to Ned for the fight(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Derek is upset when Roger gives Mavis the portrait to keep, and also receives a letter from Angela's husband. Bet tells Charlie she can never trust him again(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mavis accuses Derek of being unfaithful, and Curly is irritated when everyone asks him why he was sacked. Gail is furious when she finds Nick working when he is too ill for school(n)

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: With storm clouds gathering, the islanders realise they can no longer ignore the rumblings of war, just as it looks as though the Durrells - particularly Louisa and Spiros - may have found their happy ending. Larry marks his return by throwing an audacious play for the locals, but there are surprises for every member of the family. The fourth season of the light-hearted drama reaches its conclusion. Starring Keeley Hawes, Josh O'Connor, Milo Parker, Daisy Waterstone, Callum Woodhouse and Alexis Georgoulis(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Aidensfield's policemen struggle to deduce who could be behind a spate of sheep rustling, while Peggy is intrigued by an eco-warrior couple's slurry-fuelled generator. Helen is called in after the body of an elderly woman is found in the river, while the dead woman's son finds it difficult to deal with the consequences of his mother's demise. Drama, starring Jonathan Kerrigan and Sophie Ward(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Crime writer Ariadne Oliver (My Family's Zoe Wanamaker) and four known killers are among those who meet Poirot at a bridge evening arranged by wealthy adventurer Shaitana, who sits out the first game - only to be found later stabbed through the heart. As nobody has left or entered the victim's apartment during the night, the guests combine their skills to discover which of the party is responsible. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with Lesley Manville and Alex Jennings(n)

programme.title: Maigret
programme.desc: The detective is distracted from a string of attacks on three wealthy farms by a series of anonymous phone calls from a man who claims a gang is trying to kill him. He and his trusty associates LaPointe and Janvier go in search of the caller, which leads them to the discovery of a body that has been dumped out of a car. Maigret is convinced the corpse is the man who phoned him - but his face has been mutilated, making it impossible to confirm his identity. Rowan Atkinson stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When the body of an elderly woman is discovered at a well-known suicide spot, Ronnie soon detects foul play, with suspicion falling on the victim's son and daughter-in-law, as well as a doctor who has recently arrived in the UK. However, even after a confession is secured, Joe remains baffled as to the motive, and Kate struggles to remain professional - jeopardising her career and leaving Jake to prosecute the case alone. Guest starring Haydn Gwynne(n)

programme.title: Liar
programme.desc: Recently single teacher Laura Nielson is set up with Andrew Earlham, a widowed surgeon and the father of one of her students. The two enjoy a first date, but the next day rumours and accusations begin to circulate and the two find themselves entangled in a web of deceit and confusion. Thriller, starring Joanne Froggatt and Ioan Gruffudd, with Shelley Conn, Zoe Tapper and Warren Brown(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Wealthy industrialist Sir Reuben Astwell is murdered after making a deal to sell synthetic rubber to the Germans, leaving the dapper sleuth wondering whether the motive was commercial or political. Evidence found in his chemical factory could hold the key to the mystery - but Poirot is unsure if the victim's widow can be trusted. Starring David Suchet, with Ann Bell and Bill Wallis(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The mysterious death of a former police commissioner forces a reluctant Morse to team up with old professional rival Chief Inspector Dawson. As they and Sergeant Lewis begin to investigate, a link is uncovered to the unsolved case of a girl murdered 18 years previously. John Thaw stars, with Kevin Whately, Kenneth Colley and Christopher Eccleston(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part two of two. Taxman Charley decides to escape from the office and go strawberry-picking with Mariette and the rest of the Larkin family - a move that leaves his career hanging in the balance. Light-hearted drama based on the novels by HE Bates, starring David Jason, Pam Ferris, Philip Franks and Catherine Zeta-Jones(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The mysterious death of a former police commissioner forces a reluctant Morse to team up with old professional rival Chief Inspector Dawson. As they and Sergeant Lewis begin to investigate, a link is uncovered to the unsolved case of a girl murdered 18 years previously. John Thaw stars, with Kevin Whately, Kenneth Colley and Christopher Eccleston(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: When a woman is involved in a hit-and-run following a local dance, Miller finds himself racing to discover the identity of the culprit. Meanwhile, David decides he has had enough of Peggy's miserly ways and walks out on the taxi service(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Eric makes his preparations for the robbery, Kim offers Biff a job at Heritage Farm, and Kathy witnesses Rachel and Chris kissing at the fireworks display(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The morning after the robbery, Eric wakes up Alan telling him how drunk they were the night before. Sarah tells Jack she does not want to leave the farm(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve is upset to hear that Fiona is going to Tenerife with her friends. Raquel gives Curly the wrong idea about their friendship. Derek and Mavis's reconciliation plan goes awry(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Bet urges Raquel to put things straight with Curly, Emily is embarrassed when Samir gives her money to pay back Deirdre's loan(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Wealthy industrialist Sir Reuben Astwell is murdered after making a deal to sell synthetic rubber to the Germans, leaving the dapper sleuth wondering whether the motive was commercial or political. Evidence found in his chemical factory could hold the key to the mystery - but Poirot is unsure if the victim's widow can be trusted. Starring David Suchet, with Ann Bell and Bill Wallis(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: When a woman is involved in a hit-and-run following a local dance, Miller finds himself racing to discover the identity of the culprit. Meanwhile, David decides he has had enough of Peggy's miserly ways and walks out on the taxi service(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Millionaire Gordon Cloade's wife is widowed for the second time at the tender age of 23, arousing the suspicions of his impoverished relatives. Fanning the flames of envy and hatred, psychic aunt Kathy Cloade reveals the grieving widow's first husband is in fact still alive, and a second death prompts Poirot to delve deeper into the family's dark secrets. David Suchet stars, with Jenny Agutter, Tim Piggot-Smith and Celia Imrie(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A disused abbey that is believed to be cursed is about to be turned into a pub, a decision that has angered many superstitious locals - not to mention the real ale society. The day after the launch night, the curse appears to have claimed a victim - a body is found boiled to death in a kettle of beer, in a manner very similar to an infamous execution on the site in the 16th century. Elaine Paige guest stars, while Annette Badland joins the cast as new pathologist Fleur Perkins(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A blood-spattered hotel room and a stolen credit card lead Ronnie and Joe to Charles Hutton, a member of the wealthy upper classes who dotes on his wife Camille and daughter Georgia. The detectives find clues that suggest Georgia gave birth at the scene, but where is the baby now? The young woman and her boyfriend Rufus prove difficult for Jake and Kate to prosecute, and to make matters worse, the defence counsel turns out to be Jake's old nemesis. As the evidence stacks up, how far will Charles go to protect his privileged family? Guest starring James Wilby and Joseph Millson(n)

programme.title: Liar
programme.desc: Laura's online attack on Andrew yields unexpected consequences as a figure from her past returns to haunt her, potentially jeopardising the case. Laura resorts to extreme measures to find hard evidence of Andrew's guilt(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.desc: The Glovers plead with Ned not to go through with the fight. Betty accepts Seth's proposal, as long as her dad agrees. Frank organises a party for Chris and Kathy's anniversary(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Despite Rob's efforts to keep his wedding secret, his sisters enlist the help of the community to organise a surprise reception as the policeman prepares to marry Helen. A man's complaint about noisy neighbours turns sour when his mentally ill wife takes matters into her own hands, and Gina learns Jack's nude painting of her is to go on public display. Drama, with Jonathan Kerrigan and Sophie Ward(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: The first episode of the whimsical rural drama based on HE Bates' novels. Tax collector Cedric Charlton visits the Larkin household intent on getting the head of the family - Pop - to correctly fill out his tax forms. In so doing he falls for attractive daughter Mariette. Starring David Jason, Pam Ferris and Catherine Zeta-Jones(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A rehearsal of an amateur operatic production ends with Morse being arrested on suspicion of murder and suspended from duty pending further investigation. Stripped of official powers, he fights to clear his name - unaware he has been pencilled in as the real killer's next target. Guest starring Ian McDiarmid, with John Thaw and Kevin Whately(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Aidensfield's policemen struggle to deduce who could be behind a spate of sheep rustling, while Peggy is intrigued by an eco-warrior couple's slurry-fuelled generator. Helen is called in after the body of an elderly woman is found in the river, while the dead woman's son finds it difficult to deal with the consequences of his mother's demise. Drama, starring Jonathan Kerrigan and Sophie Ward(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Frank tells Kim about the suspicious noises coming from Mill Cottage. Ned plans to go ahead with the fight despite family protests. Alan unveils his home brew at the Woolpack(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Scott is grounded for stealing fireworks, Caroline invites Eric to the Tates' bonfire, Jack tells Ned he is scared he might lose Sarah, and Luke apologises to Ned for the fight(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Derek is upset when Roger gives Mavis the portrait to keep, and also receives a letter from Angela's husband. Bet tells Charlie she can never trust him again(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mavis accuses Derek of being unfaithful, and Curly is irritated when everyone asks him why he was sacked. Gail is furious when she finds Nick working when he is too ill for school(n)

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: With storm clouds gathering, the islanders realise they can no longer ignore the rumblings of war, just as it looks as though the Durrells - particularly Louisa and Spiros - may have found their happy ending. Larry marks his return by throwing an audacious play for the locals, but there are surprises for every member of the family. The fourth season of the light-hearted drama reaches its conclusion. Starring Keeley Hawes, Josh O'Connor, Milo Parker, Daisy Waterstone, Callum Woodhouse and Alexis Georgoulis(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Aidensfield's policemen struggle to deduce who could be behind a spate of sheep rustling, while Peggy is intrigued by an eco-warrior couple's slurry-fuelled generator. Helen is called in after the body of an elderly woman is found in the river, while the dead woman's son finds it difficult to deal with the consequences of his mother's demise. Drama, starring Jonathan Kerrigan and Sophie Ward(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Crime writer Ariadne Oliver (My Family's Zoe Wanamaker) and four known killers are among those who meet Poirot at a bridge evening arranged by wealthy adventurer Shaitana, who sits out the first game - only to be found later stabbed through the heart. As nobody has left or entered the victim's apartment during the night, the guests combine their skills to discover which of the party is responsible. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with Lesley Manville and Alex Jennings(n)

programme.title: Maigret
programme.desc: The detective is distracted from a string of attacks on three wealthy farms by a series of anonymous phone calls from a man who claims a gang is trying to kill him. He and his trusty associates LaPointe and Janvier go in search of the caller, which leads them to the discovery of a body that has been dumped out of a car. Maigret is convinced the corpse is the man who phoned him - but his face has been mutilated, making it impossible to confirm his identity. Rowan Atkinson stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When the body of an elderly woman is discovered at a well-known suicide spot, Ronnie soon detects foul play, with suspicion falling on the victim's son and daughter-in-law, as well as a doctor who has recently arrived in the UK. However, even after a confession is secured, Joe remains baffled as to the motive, and Kate struggles to remain professional - jeopardising her career and leaving Jake to prosecute the case alone. Guest starring Haydn Gwynne(n)

programme.title: Liar
programme.desc: Recently single teacher Laura Nielson is set up with Andrew Earlham, a widowed surgeon and the father of one of her students. The two enjoy a first date, but the next day rumours and accusations begin to circulate and the two find themselves entangled in a web of deceit and confusion. Thriller, starring Joanne Froggatt and Ioan Gruffudd, with Shelley Conn, Zoe Tapper and Warren Brown(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Wealthy industrialist Sir Reuben Astwell is murdered after making a deal to sell synthetic rubber to the Germans, leaving the dapper sleuth wondering whether the motive was commercial or political. Evidence found in his chemical factory could hold the key to the mystery - but Poirot is unsure if the victim's widow can be trusted. Starring David Suchet, with Ann Bell and Bill Wallis(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The mysterious death of a former police commissioner forces a reluctant Morse to team up with old professional rival Chief Inspector Dawson. As they and Sergeant Lewis begin to investigate, a link is uncovered to the unsolved case of a girl murdered 18 years previously. John Thaw stars, with Kevin Whately, Kenneth Colley and Christopher Eccleston(n)

programme.desc: Eric makes his preparations for the robbery, Kim offers Biff a job at Heritage Farm, and Kathy witnesses Rachel and Chris kissing at the fireworks display(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve is upset to hear that Fiona is going to Tenerife with her friends. Raquel gives Curly the wrong idea about their friendship. Derek and Mavis's reconciliation plan goes awry(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Millionaire Gordon Cloade's wife is widowed for the second time at the tender age of 23, arousing the suspicions of his impoverished relatives. Fanning the flames of envy and hatred, psychic aunt Kathy Cloade reveals the grieving widow's first husband is in fact still alive, and a second death prompts Poirot to delve deeper into the family's dark secrets. David Suchet stars, with Jenny Agutter, Tim Piggot-Smith and Celia Imrie(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A disused abbey that is believed to be cursed is about to be turned into a pub, a decision that has angered many superstitious locals - not to mention the real ale society. The day after the launch night, the curse appears to have claimed a victim - a body is found boiled to death in a kettle of beer, in a manner very similar to an infamous execution on the site in the 16th century. Elaine Paige guest stars, while Annette Badland joins the cast as new pathologist Fleur Perkins(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A blood-spattered hotel room and a stolen credit card lead Ronnie and Joe to Charles Hutton, a member of the wealthy upper classes who dotes on his wife Camille and daughter Georgia. The detectives find clues that suggest Georgia gave birth at the scene, but where is the baby now? The young woman and her boyfriend Rufus prove difficult for Jake and Kate to prosecute, and to make matters worse, the defence counsel turns out to be Jake's old nemesis. As the evidence stacks up, how far will Charles go to protect his privileged family? Guest starring James Wilby and Joseph Millson(n)

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are pitted against KGB assassins when a CI5 operative is apparently raised from the dead. A proposed exchange finds Cowley at a deserted aerodrome, and a burst of gunfire apparently leaves his life on the line. Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson star(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A captured British spy is released when his Russian counterpart falls into British hands. C15 is tasked with ensuring his safety as well as establishing whether his information is genuine. However, such intentions fail miserably when he is poisoned. Bodie and Doyle set out to determine what part his daughter, a concert pianist, played in his death - assuming she really is his daughter(n)

programme.title: Hornblower
programme.desc: Hornblower's resourcefulness turns the attack on the Spanish-held fortress into a famous victory, but Buckland's treachery puts his life into further danger. Surviving a risky mission to blow up the fortifications and an attempt by the prisoners to take command of the Renown, the hero faces the death penalty for pushing Captain Sawyer into the hold - and hopes Archie's dying words can save him from the noose. Naval adventure, based on the stories by CS Forester, and starring Ioan Gruffudd(n)

programme.title: Snooker: World Grand Prix
programme.desc: Jill Douglas presents coverage of the afternoon session of the final on day seven at The Centaur in Cheltenham, as the first nine frames take place. With analysis from Stephen Hendry, Alan McManus and Neal Foulds, and commentary by David Hendon and Phil Yates(n)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade heads to Russia's remote Amur River, where the mysterious deaths of three men appear to be linked to a freshwater giant - a beast that can exceed 18ft in length and weigh more than a ton. However, he encounters a wall of silence and begins to suspect he has stumbled on to a dark secret that isn't supposed to be uncovered(n)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to the rivers of India's Himalayan region to investigate a fresh spate of attacks by a type of catfish, but his plans to catch a specimen run into trouble when locals reveal it is sacred and he will be cursed if it is touched. As the hunt progresses, Wade's single-minded determination leads him into a psychological battle with the creature(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The hero bumbles his way through a disaster-packed day that takes him from the swimming baths and lunch in the park on to a night at the cinema with his girlfriend. Rowan Atkinson stars, with Angus Deayton and Matilda Ziegler(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Rowan Atkinson leaves his brain at home once more to play the bungling buffoon of few words. He goes shopping for a new TV, has problems with an itchy foot and takes a lucky girl for a night on the town - leaving the usual trail of chaos in his wake(n)

programme.title: World of Sport: The Good, the Bad & the Ugly
programme.desc: Richard Henwood delves into the ITV sport archives to take a look back at the careers of racing drivers James Hunt and Barry Sheene, and a spectacular crash by Kelvin Burt(n)

programme.title: Snooker: World Grand Prix
programme.desc: Jill Douglas presents coverage of the concluding session of the final on day seven at The Centaur in Cheltenham, where the first player to reach 10 frames will take the title. Judd Trump was victorious in last year's showpiece match, overcoming Ali Carter 10-6 to emulate his triumph over Ronnie O'Sullivan in 2015. It was one of a number of triumphs for 'The Juddernaut' in 2019, with the World Championship among the other honours which followed as he rose to the top of the rankings. With analysis from Stephen Hendry, Alan McManus and Neal Foulds, and commentary by David Hendon and Phil Yates(n)

programme.title: Oblivion (2013)
programme.desc: A repairman is assigned to salvage the remaining resources from Earth, which has been left a devastated wasteland after a war with an alien race. He discovers a human survivor on the surface of the planet, an encounter that exposes secrets from the past that threaten the future of the human race. Sci-fi adventure, starring Tom Cruise and Morgan Freeman(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A cop appears to have accidentally killed his own partner, but Theo thinks he may be covering for his drug-addicted girlfriend. Guest starring Lynn Redgrave and Morgan Fairchild(n)

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A racehorse trainer asks Holmes to investigate the mysterious disappearance of one of his cash-strapped employer's many creditors. Victorian whodunit, starring Jeremy Brett and Edward Hardwicke, with a young Jude Law in an early supporting role(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: A car he sold in 1970 returns to haunt Arthur - who ends up being framed for crimes he did not commit. Drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle spring into action when East German agents blackmail a government employee into revealing secret plans for a new type of jet-engine tank. Featuring an appearance by playwright Lynda La Plante, alongside stars Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The Flying Squad trails diamond thief Jimmy Fleet on the inside, with Carter acting undercover as a fellow prisoner aiming to gain his confidence. On his release for lack of evidence, Fleet seeks Carter's assistance after discovering his girlfriend has vanished with the jewels, suspecting she has been abducted. Michael Elphick guest stars(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A medical student accuses a veteran doctor of covering up the true cause of a homicide, so Quincy intervenes to determine the truth(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo investigates the murder of a dock worker which may be the work of mobsters controlling the unions, but encounters a conspiracy of silence among the dead man's colleagues(n)

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A desperate girl contacts Holmes and asks him to clear her boyfriend of killing his father, a farmer found bludgeoned to death beside a lake. Period drama, starring Jeremy Brett , Peter Vaughan and James Purefoy(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur is held hostage by former friend Frankie Connor, who is now a prisoner on the run and desperate to know whether his wife is having an affair with Italian restaurateur Luigi. Final episode of the light-hearted drama, starring George Cole, Gary Webster and Glynn Edwards(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: When a CIA agent dies after being thrown off a balcony, the unit sets up a fake arms deal with the German terrorist cell responsible. However, the gunrunners uncover the ploy, kidnap Bodie and transform him into a walking time-bomb. Lewis Collins stars(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Guest stars Eric Morecambe and Ernie Wise are entrusted to guard a consignment of heart pills by the girlfriend of the eminent research chemist developing the medicine. Before long, the comedy duo find themselves pursued by Middle Eastern operatives intent on procuring the new drug, as well as Sweeney officers who are trying to protect them. With John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh invites another selection of celebrity contestants to pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser. This time, the stars hoping to score a win for charity are Loose Women's Kaye Adams, football commentator Mark Bright, Olympic gold medal-winning ice dancer Jayne Torvill, and Good Morning Britain presenter Richard Arnold. The famous competitors must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: The Mountain
programme.desc: Documentary charting a year in the life of Snowdon, capturing the beauty of its four seasons and the lives of the men and women who reside or work near the highest peak in England and Wales. The programme reveals the passions, challenges and dangers of life on the busiest mountain in Britain. Matthew Gravelle narrates(n)

programme.title: The Mountain
programme.desc: The arrival of spring sees the crowds return to Snowdon, with railwayman Steff re-opening the summit cafe and singer Shirley Bassey unveiling a train carriage named in her honour. The return of paying customers is good news for Alwena and her cafe 1,800ft up the mountain, but the busy paths to the summit spell trouble for Rob and his mountain rescue team(n)

programme.title: Sudden Death (1995)
programme.desc: Terrorists seize control of an ice-hockey stadium in the middle of a match attended by the US vice president. Taking the politician hostage, they threaten to blow up the building at the final whistle - but a resourceful former fireman takes it upon himself to thwart their dastardly plot. Action thriller, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme, Powers Boothe, Raymond J Barry and Whittni Wright(n)

programme.desc: Part one of two. A politician tries to stop Theo pursuing a connection between an attempted murder and a woman in prison for killing her mother. Guest starring Geraldine Page(n)

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: In the most dangerous assignment of his career, Holmes is asked to stop the marriage of Violet Merville to Baron Gruner - a wealthy collector of objets d'art and beautiful women, whom the sleuth knows to be a murderer. Victorian detective drama, guest starring Anthony Valentine with Jeremy Brett(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur attends an Italian wedding as guest of honour, and when Terry is held hostage at a launderette, the conman decides to sell the story to the media. First episode of the comedy drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Doyle considers his future in CI5 after it transpires the father of his fiancee is under surveillance by the unit, suspected of being part of an international drug-smuggling ring. Patricia Hodge guest stars, with Martin Shaw(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: An apparently respected gynaecologist's suitcase is stolen, but he is reluctant to reveal its contents. On further investigation the squad learns he was in the process of smuggling untaxed money out of the country and that a glamorous Latin woman with criminal connections, may hold the key to its whereabouts(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as one-time Coronation Street actor Jimi Mistry (Khalid Nazir), former Emmerdale star Gemma Atkinson (Carly Hope), Loose Women's Nadia Sawalha and veteran actor James Cosmo pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser, in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds for the charity of their choice. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Apollo 13 (1995)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about the ill-fated 1970 Apollo 13 mission to the moon. Crew leader Jim Lovell is faced with a nightmare when the mission suffers an on-board explosion - leaving the team stranded in space with a dwindling oxygen supply while flight controllers and engineers in Houston try to find a way to bring the crew safely back to Earth. With Tom Hanks, Kevin Bacon, Bill Paxton, Ed Harris and Gary Sinise(n)

programme.desc: The presenter follows folks as they start up their dream business, beginning with Londoners Jade and Alice. They moved to the Scottish Highlands and started a new life at a small, 200-year-old hotel on the edge of a Loch. The newlyweds' plan is to become their own boss as hoteliers and restaurateurs. With no experience in the industry, they face a race to get the place ready for the summer tourist trade, refurbishing all of the rooms themselves in between getting to grips with running the restaurant(n)

programme.title: My New Greek Life
programme.desc: Documentary following British people who have made a fresh start on the Greek Islands. The first programme features the Ross family, who have left Cornwall to live on a Yacht but are now struggling with the demands of living in such close quarters, and a 55-year-old Welsh woman looking for love in Crete. Elsewhere, a couple try to fund their new life by restoring a stone cottage as a holiday let(n)

programme.title: Eamonn & Ruth: How the Other Half Lives
programme.desc: Eamonn Holmes and Ruth Langsford explore more extravagant lifestyles with a visit to Monte Carlo, the playground of the glamorous super-rich. They rub shoulders with the likes of former Formula 1 boss Flavio Briatore, who invites the couple into his ultra-exclusive club, and discover just how little $30million will buy in the most crowded and expensive property market on earth. The couple also visit the Monte Carlo Casino and are let loose in a wine cellar estimated to be worth 80million euros(n)

programme.title: Doctor Dolittle (1967)
programme.desc: A Victorian veterinary surgeon is certified insane after developing the ability to talk to his patients in their own language. Undaunted, he manages to escape from the asylum and embarks on a quest to locate a rare aquatic snail. Oscar-winning musical comedy, with Rex Harrison, Samantha Eggar, Richard Attenborough and Anthony Newley. Songs include Talk to the Animals and I've Never Seen Anything Like It(n)

programme.title: Stuart Little (1999)
programme.desc: An American couple decide their son needs a brother, and plan to adopt another child - but when they get to the orphanage they are greeted by a charming talking mouse named Stuart, who fits the bill perfectly. However, their jealous cat hatches a plot to get rid of the new arrival. Comedy adventure, starring Geena Davis and Hugh Laurie, with the voice of Michael J Fox(n)

programme.title: Enemy Mine (1985)

programme.desc: The heroic autobots discover that a spaceship from their own planet crashed into the moon decades ago, carrying their former leader and an incredibly powerful device. They must fight to defend the human race as their enemies the decepticons plot to use this machine to rebuild their own world and destroy the Earth. Sci-fi adventure sequel, with Shia LaBeouf, Josh Duhamel and Rosie Huntington-Whiteley(n)

Action thriller, starring Sylvester Stallone, Sung Kang and Christian Slater(n)

programme.title: Amour (2012)

Oscar-winning drama, starring Jean-Louis Trintignant, Emmanuelle Riva and Isabelle Huppert. In French and English(n)

programme.desc: An American army platoon on duty during the Korean war is left stranded in the mountains while covering their comrades' retreat. Among them is a timid corporal with no real experience of battle, who is soon forced into assuming command when all his superior officers are killed. Drama, starring Richard Basehart, Gene Evans and Michael O'Shea(n)

programme.title: Comanche (1956)

However, a group of renegade warriors are unwilling to surrender their arms and their actions prompt a bigoted government official to use brutal methods. Western, starring Dana Andrews, Kent Smith, Nestor Paiva and Henry Brandon(n)

programme.title: Only the Brave (2017)

programme.title: Joker Interview Special
