programme.title: Snowpiercer (2013)
programme.desc: In a snow-ravaged world, a group of travellers fight for survival on a train that perpetually circumnavigates the globe. The vehicle's occupants are divided into a military ruling elite and their dishevelled captives. But now, 17 years after the train set out on its seemingly never-ending journey, the downtrodden, abused captives have had enough. Revolution is afoot. Bong Joon Ho's fantasy thriller, starring Chris Evans, Song Kang-ho, Tilda Swinton, Jamie Bell and Octavia Spencer(n)

programme.title: You Were Never Really Here (2017)
programme.desc: A former soldier is haunted by memories of abuse and suicidal fantasies, but uses his military skills to rescue abducted girls whose families don't want to involve the authorities. His latest contract is to liberate a senator's teenage daughter, who has been trafficked into a brothel. Lynne Ramsay's psychological thriller, starring Joaquin Phoenix, with Ekaterina Samsonov and Judith Roberts(n)

programme.title: The Counsellor (2013)
programme.desc: A lawyer who earns a living representing drug dealers makes a fateful decision to take an active role in their criminal activities. He quickly finds himself out of his depth in a criminal underworld he barely understands, where his actions bring deadly consequences. Ridley Scott's crime thriller, starring Michael Fassbender, Penelope Cruz, Cameron Diaz, Javier Bardem and Brad Pitt(n)

programme.title: Warlock (1959)
programme.desc: A ruthless vigilante is recruited as a sheriff to clean up the streets of a crime-ridden town, but his strong-arm tactics soon antagonise the townsfolk. When a woman turns up and accuses the lawman of murdering her fiance, the residents rally to her cause with the help of a rival gunslinger. Western, starring Henry Fonda, Richard Widmark, Anthony Quinn, DeForest Kelley and Dorothy Malone(n)

programme.title: 40 Guns to Apache Pass (1967)
programme.desc: A cavalry captain sets out to deliver a shipment of rifles to a fort besieged by marauding Apaches, but the mission is undermined by a villainous corporal who plans to steal the weapons and sell them to the enemy. Western, starring Audie Murphy, Michael Burns, Laraine Stephens, Kenneth Tobey and Michael Keep(n)

programme.title: The 39 Steps (1959)
programme.desc: An innocent man becomes embroiled in international espionage as he tries to uncover the meaning behind the cryptic last words of a mystery woman, whom he knew for only a brief time before finding her dying in his flat. He must flee for his life from foreign spies and the police, who think he is a murderer. Spy thriller based on John Buchan's novel, starring Kenneth More, Taina Elg, Barry Jones and James Hayter(n)

programme.title: Buchanan Rides Alone (1958)
programme.desc: A drifter rides into a town dominated by the members of a ruthless family. He befriends a Mexican in jail for killing a man who attacked his sister and tries to save him from the gallows, getting caught up in the evil clan's running internal conflicts in the process. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Craig Stevens, Manuel Rojas and Barry Kelley(n)

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still (2008)
programme.desc: An alien arrives on Earth, accompanied by an awesomely powerful robot, on a fateful mission - to decide if the human race deserves to continue - and if not, to wipe it out. The visitor is imprisoned in a military facility, but a scientist helps him escape, hoping to prove that mankind is worth saving. Sci-fi drama remake, starring Keanu Reeves and Jennifer Connelly(n)

programme.title: Gods of Egypt (2016)
programme.desc: An ancient Egyptian god is driven into exile when his evil brother murders their father and seizes his throne. He enlists the aid of a human thief in restoring justice, and in return offers to help the mortal to bring his murdered lover back to life. Fantasy adventure, starring Nikolaj Coster-Waldau, Brenton Thwaites, Gerard Butler and Chadwick Boseman(n)

programme.title: Wild (2014)
programme.desc: A series of devastating personal traumas leaves a woman feeling self-destructive and lost. After spending years behaving recklessly, she decides to turn things around by embarking on an epic, solo trek along America's Pacific Crest Trail, which gives her the time and space to reassess her existence. Drama based on a true story, starring Reese Witherspoon and Laura Dern(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Murray grows a moustache, it ignites a feud between his wife Beverly and his best friend Bill. Barry is convinced that he's lost Lainey's affections when Erica tells him that his girlfriend is in love with Culture Club singer Boy George. David Koechner guest stars(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: At Halloween, Barry and Erica persuade Adam not to go trick-or-treating but to take his girlfriend Dana to a haunted house instead. Beverly attempts to teach Adam a lesson about the dangers of the spooky celebration, but her plan backfires. Dustin Ybarra guest stars(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: After Captain Holt is transferred to the NYPD Department of Public Relations, the arrival of a new captain causes the precinct to dissolve into chaos - despite the best efforts of Sergeant Jeffords. meanwhile, Peralta and Santiago face the aftermath of their kiss. Kyra Sedgwick and Bill Hader guest star(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The division incurs another personnel change that threatens to put Jake and Amy's budding relationship at risk. Meanwhile, Terry assists Holt with an important public relations matter and Rosa and Gina try to convince Charles to rethink his affection for a fellow officer. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake thinks Boyle might have met his soulmate in Genevieve, an art gallery owner, and tries to set the pair up on a date. Meanwhile, Rosa deals with an intra-precinct theft and Amy seeks Holt's help with an image campaign. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While investigating a serial killer, Peralta enlists Holt's help in an attempt to solve the case without the new captain finding out. Diaz and Santiago are forced to deal with the murderer's demands, while Jeffords discovers a new obsession. Comedy, guest starring Kyra Sedgwick and Dean Winters, with Andy Samberg(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Holt split the squad into two teams to help them win the Halloween heist contest. Each side attempts to steal the same item, a fancy-dress crown locked in a briefcase in the interrogation room in order to claim the title of 'amazing detective or genius'(n)

programme.title: Forever in My Heart (2019)
programme.desc: While in Ireland on an internship, Jenna falls in love with the Charlie, the son of the owner of the hotel she has been assigned to, but they end up going their separate ways. Five years later, she returns to Ireland and bumps into Charlie again - and it's immediately clear that they still have feelings for one another. Romantic drama, starring Merritt Patterson and Jack Turner(n)

Guest starring Yeardley Smith (The voice of Lisa Simpson)(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is invited to visit the Large Hadron Collider in Switzerland and asks Penny to join him as a Valentine's Day treat. However, Sheldon tries to persuade the couple to allow him to take her place(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon misses an opportunity to meet Spider-Man co-creator Stan Lee when he has to go to court for driving through a red light, and his anger leads to his imprisonment. Penny finds out the address of the comic-book writer and takes Sheldon there - but his troubles with the law have yet to reach their conclusion and the visit does not go as expected(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends fight over a ring they believe was used in the Lord of the Rings film trilogy. Leonard hopes to return the item to its rightful owner - but Raj wishes to sell it so he can buy a jet ski, and Sheldon develops a Gollum-like obsession with the precious object(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Action comedy based on a comic book, starring Colin Firth, Taron Egerton and Samuel L Jackson(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.desc: Raj and Howard register Sheldon with an online dating site hoping to find his perfect female equivalent. Meanwhile, a drunk Penny seduces Leonard, but regrets it the next day. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Manchester, lorry-driving movie buff Ryan plans a film-inspired menu including his 'Prawn Identity' starter, 'Sausage Meat the Fockers' and 'Chocolate Clockwork Orange' desert. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Glamorous 'domestic delegator' Fiona aims to impress with a classy but effortless menu. However, critical Linzi takes issue with Fiona's mother chopping her vegetables and her cousin making her honeycomb. Then, there's more trouble brewing as Nico and Johanna clash(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Critical laundrette owner Linzi has been a hard taskmaster all week in the Manchester area, so expects to show her guests where they've been going wrong. Self-proclaimed domestic delegator Fiona has to face her fears during Linzi's entertainment - an ironing competition(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in the Manchester area, Nico plans to show the Brits how it's done in the kitchen with his Italian cooking. He's been talking up his Italian heritage all week, and Linzi's convinced he's heading for a fall. It remains to be seen who will pick up the £1,000 prize(n)

However, around half of the 45 rooms are yet to receive adequate attention, the couple's fledgling events business demands attention, and the outbuildings are still in need of conversion(n)

programme.desc: Jamie Theakston travels to Sardinia to meet the scientists and archaeologists who have evidence that suggests giants once existed. Researchers have discovered abnormally large human skeletons in networks of elaborate caves, mines and tombs in Sardinia, China, the United States, northern India and South America. However, if the race did exist, it remains unclear as to why it has seemingly been eradicated from history(n)

programme.title: Mission: Kill Hitler
programme.desc: A plot to kill the fuhrer that remained secret until the late 1990s. Operation Foxley planned to murder Hitler during his daily morning walk at the Berghof, his Bavarian residence. Two soldiers parachuted into the area were supposed to find a perfect location to shoot Hitler and stop the devastating war. Based on the British Secret Services' declassified documents, using archives and fictionalised reconstitutions, this film recounts the full story and the detailed plan that should have led to the murder of Adolf Hitler, and explains why it failed.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Paul and Bev have been married for a decade and now wish to realise their dream of relocating to Torrevieja, Spain. Jean Johansson sets out to help find them an appropriate property(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Beaver, Pennsylvania, where he meets a brother-and-sister team who find it almost impossible to work together. Their relationship is so fractured that they're failing to save their father's Italian restaurant Levanti's from being overwhelmed by local competition, and the situation has become so desperate that their dad is in danger of losing his life savings(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Sam's Mediterranean Kabob Room in Monrovia, California, and within minutes of his arrival, is caught in the crossfire of an argument between the owner, his wife and their children, all of whom are feeling the pressure of working seven days a week. Can the chef save the business and mend the warring family's frayed relationships?(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Park's Edge restaurant in Atlanta, Georgia, where a series of spats with the local community are hampering its success. Owners Richard and Jorge's in-fighting has alienated locals, and the duo's suggestion that customer numbers are low because of racism has heightened tensions(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Greek at the Harbour restaurant in southern California, where owner Makis Mikelatos works 17 hours a day, seven days a week, but is unwilling to let his son Ari take the reins. Gordon sets out to get to the bottom of Makis's reluctance to teach his son, and uncovers a shocking family secret(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Mike & Nellie's Steakhouse in Oakhurst, New Jersey, where owner Mike Farber is mourning his father Nellie, who was also his business partner. Having been called in by the restaurateur's two daughters, Gordon faces the task of getting him to focus on his business, before tackling the bigger problem of rotting decor and a less-than-appealing menu(n)

programme.title: The Windsors: Secrets of the Royal Tours
programme.desc: Documentary examining official tours and state visits by the royal family, exploring the history of the symbolic locations on the touring map, beginning by capturing the celebration and optimism after the end of the Second World War(n)

programme.title: Barrymore: The Body in the Pool
programme.desc: In the early hours of March 31, 2001, a phone call was made to Essex emergency services to say a body had been found in the swimming pool of Michael Barrymore - at the time, one of the most popular entertainers in Britain. Every detail of the story was pored over by the media but 19 years on, the death remains unexplained. This documentary looks at the full story, with contributions from Stuart's family, detectives, forensic pathologists and eyewitnesses, to explore what happened that night at Barrymore's Essex home - and the events that followed(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.title: Britain's Most Expensive Home: Building for a Billionaire
programme.desc: Following the complex build of an extraordinary home costing millions in Mayfair, London, which belongs to self-made billionaire and philanthropist John Caudwell. Having sold Phones 4u in 2006 for just under 1.5 billion pounds, John is now aiming to create one of the most lavish and expensive homes ever to be renovated in Britain. As the build enters the final crucial stages, the programme follows this unique and challenging engineering project as a team of expert trades people and interior designers attempt to pull off one of the most extraordinary renovations in Britain(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction

First up is 25-year-old Hope, a model from Birmingham. A huge wrestling fan, she is keen to find a man who can finally pin her down. She is followed by 28-year-old veterinary student Kurt, a real-life Dr Doolittle who can talk to the animals but gets tongue-tied speaking to women. Will Naked Attraction's unique dating method help him overcome his shyness?(n)

programme.title: My Family and the Galapagos
programme.desc: Two years on since Monty Halls, his wife Tam and daughters Isla and Molly first travelled to the Galapagos islands - one of the most unique and ecologically important places on the planet - the family head back to discover why it faces a fight for survival. In the opening episode, Monty experiences the mighty volcanic power that created the islands, mum Tam makes a solo voyage in search of threatened giant manta rays, and Molly, the youngest, has her first snorkelling experience(n)

programme.title: Australia on Fire: Climate Emergency
programme.desc: The dramatic and terrifying story of the battle to save Australia from the bushfires ravaging the country, including first-hand accounts from firefighters on the front line. Reporter Kylie Morris examines the long-term impact of the fires on the diverse animal population and ecology, with drone footage revealing the extent of the devastation, while the programme also features testimony from those who only just escaped their burning homes with their lives, as well as hearing from some of those who have returned to burnt-out properties(n)

programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick treats a border collie in a lot of pain with a suspicious lump on its ankle. programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Tim Betts, the CEO of Muscle Maker Grill, goes undercover in the company he recently bought. Tim wants to make sure the brand is healthy and continues to expand, and he believes it's key that as they grow, each restaurant branch follows the same set of corporate standards. programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Chris and Lynne find a holiday home in Spain they can use for family holidays, showing them five properties around Mojácar for their budget of £80,000(n)

programme.desc: A couple with a gite in France find their pool infested with algae, a family running a campsite find themselves with no hot water, and money troubles threaten holiday lets in Spain(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen(n)

programme.title: My Family and the Galapagos
programme.desc: Two years on since Monty Halls, his wife Tam and daughters Isla and Molly first travelled to the Galapagos islands - one of the most unique and ecologically important places on the planet - the family head back to discover why it faces a fight for survival. In the opening episode, Monty experiences the mighty volcanic power that created the islands, mum Tam makes a solo voyage in search of threatened giant manta rays, and Molly, the youngest, has her first snorkelling experience(n)

programme.title: Britain's Most Expensive Home: Building for a Billionaire
programme.desc: Following the complex build of an extraordinary home costing millions in Mayfair, London, which belongs to self-made billionaire and philanthropist John Caudwell. Having sold Phones 4u in 2006 for just under 1.5 billion pounds, John is now aiming to create one of the most lavish and expensive homes ever to be renovated in Britain. As the build enters the final crucial stages, the programme follows this unique and challenging engineering project as a team of expert trades people and interior designers attempt to pull off one of the most extraordinary renovations in Britain(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes two more singletons to choose a date after seeing what their potential partners have to offer on a purely physical level. First up is 25-year-old Hope, a model from Birmingham. A huge wrestling fan, she is keen to find a man who can finally pin her down. She is followed by 28-year-old veterinary student Kurt, a real-life Dr Doolittle who can talk to the animals but gets tongue-tied speaking to women. Will Naked Attraction's unique dating method help him overcome his shyness?(n)

programme.title: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Cameras reveal what can go wrong when a dream holiday turns into a nightmare. Psychologists and industry experts also reflect on the anxieties and situations that many can experience during a break(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men

programme.title: Two and a Half Men

programme.title: Two and a Half Men

programme.title: Two and a Half Men

programme.title: Two and a Half Men

programme.title: Two and a Half Men

programme.desc: Gareth and Craig investigate a possible case of mistaken identity in Shropshire, then in south Wales find themselves embroiled in a bitter dispute between two dog owners over a vet's bill. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben try to drill through the locks on a property to evict the residents, only to find to their surprise that the door has been modified with special reinforced metal. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court Enforcement agents evict a large group of squatters barricaded into a disused nursery in London, and have to resort to smashing their way in as they refuse to leave. Meanwhile, agents in Bristol try to recover over £10,000 owed by a plumbing business to a supplier, and emotions run high when they attempt to evict a tenant who pleads her innocence in West London(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: An episode combining new and unforgettable past cases. The High Court Enforcement Agents head to Manchester to track down over £5,000-worth of debt, and seize an expensive car in the process. programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

programme.desc: Part one of two. A police officer who started laughing after being shot is brought in, and soon starts to exhibit a string of bizarre ailments. As the patient gets worse, however, the doctors fear for their colleague's condition. Hugh Laurie stars(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: Part two of two. Foreman is placed in isolation and given a succession of drugs as the team struggles to diagnose his illness. Frustrated by Cuddy's insistence on protocol, House takes a rat to the original victim's apartment and infects it, hoping to perform an autopsy once it sickens. However, when the animal fails to succumb, he gains information that could save his colleague. Hugh Laurie and Omar Epps star(n)

A couple in Suffolk agree to rent a property to its former owner, who now refuses to leave, and a single mum tricks her way into a Milton Keynes property, confirming she has paid the deposit having done no such thing(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The story of landlords Pauline and Simon, who bought a property blind with tenants in situ - not realising the difficulties that would ensue. It turned out their tenants were causing havoc in the neighbourhood and had more than a hundred arrests between them for drugs and domestic violence - and if the landlords did not evict them, they themselves could be prosecuted. Plus, a Slough landlord forced to call in an eviction expert when his tenant cut off all communication(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate the rape of a cellist, and initially believe her conductor is to blame for the attack - especially given his penchant for erotic film-making. However, they soon discover an obsessive stalker is watching her from afar - and will stop at nothing to continue his monitoring. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Cabot takes a child abuse case, determined to find evidence that will convict the defendant. Her personal feelings tempt her to bend the rules, leading Stabler and Benson into an illegal search of the victim's home - a move that threatens all of their careers(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A urologist is murdered, and his wife claims she was raped and robbed by the killer. Stabler and Benson suspect the doctor's mistress of being involved - until she too is sexually assaulted, and details of another relationship emerge, shedding light on the culprit's identity. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and another officer team up to track down a serial killer, focusing their investigation on a recently released sex offender - but fresh evidence leads them to believe he may have been wrongly convicted. Concerned that a miscarriage of justice could have occurred, they look over old case files and turn their attention to the suspect's neighbour, a man with employment links in the vicinity of seven murders around the country. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and David Keith(n)

programme.title: Chicago Justice
programme.desc: An intensive investigation is launched when a Muslim student is murdered, while racial and religious tensions are heightened when a second suspect emerges(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the death of a Russian model, and when the autopsy reveals a host of old injuries they suspect long-term abuse. Further tests are made on the body, and the findings suggest medical malpractice may have been the cause, leading the detectives to track down the person responsible for her death. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella is convinced that a woman's apparent suicide is a cover-up for murder, ending a three-year quest to trace her missing twin brother. The detective hurries to compile enough evidence to prove her instincts right and is nearly killed by the victim's stepfather - but with the culprit in custody, she hopes to find out more about the long-lost sibling. Crime drama, starring Melina Kanakaredes and Robert Joy(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A prisoner requests Hawkes' presence at his execution, and makes a confession that shocks the forensic scientist. However, just as the lethal injection is about to be administered, a guard drops dead - and a riot ensues that brings Hawkes face to face with one of his old enemies. Guest starring Harold Perrineau (Lost, Oz) and Edward Furlong (Terminator 2, American History X)(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Jaruszalski and Morales investigate when thieves known to be part of a crime ring turn their attention away from robbery and toward assault and murder. A spoiled young actress is suspected of being involved, her role being to keep the victims entertained and out of their houses while the rest of the gang gets to work. Crime drama, starring Corey Stoll and Alfred Molina(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: An explosion claims the lives of two young children who were waiting in their car while their mother delivered something to a house. Initial inquiries reveal that the owner was cooking meth in his garage, but the case changes course when it becomes apparent that what was actually being stored were the ingredients to make a bomb. Evidence leads the team to an address where officers find evidence of a cell of white American Muslims with plans to bomb Los Angeles airport. Starring Corey Stoll and Skeet Ulrich(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A baseball star becomes the prime suspect in the murder of his limousine driver, who had been regularly supplying him with steroids. Briscoe and Green's investigation reveals blackmail as the underlying motive for the crime. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The charred body of an Asian girl is found outside the apartment of the Chinese consul general. Forensics discover she was murdered before her corpse was burned, prompting detectives to investigate rumours that the diplomat is somehow connected. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A missing shoe discovered on the dead body of a homeless person leads Jessica to believe that the supposed accidental death was actually intentional. She poses as a wealthy widow to investigate the case of an accountant who apparently died as a result of alcoholism. Dirk Benedict guest stars alongside Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The spirit of old Salem comes to Cabot Cove as Jessica investigates strange happenings involving a woman who has been dead for three centuries. Guest starring Roddy McDowall and Dee Wallace Stone, with Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The discovery of a woman's body in the East River leads Briscoe and Green to investigate the drug-addicted brother of a famous footballer - and as the case unfolds, it becomes clear she may not have been the killer's only victim. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green think they have got their man when the prime suspect in a murder investigation knows every detail about the killing. However, when he claims he acquired his information from a psychic vision, the detectives have their work cut out. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gibbs joins forces with the FBI when the body of a congressman and former agent washes ashore in New Orleans. Together they try to determine if the murder could be linked to a well-known case the victim had previously worked on during his career. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Cote de Pablo and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A woman and her date are murdered in her apartment while enjoying a romantic evening in. Though Goren and Eames initially suspect the married father of her 18-month-old daughter, they soon begin to believe that members of her rich family were involved in the crime - and may have killed before. Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe star, with Doris Roberts and Richard Kind(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The stepdaughter of a judge known for his harsh sentencing of sex offenders is raped and murdered. Stabler and Benson's investigations reveal the rebellious girl had been involved with defendants in her stepfather's cases - and a revelation from her childhood leads the detectives to point the finger of suspicion at the victim's nearest and dearest. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate an assault on a restaurateur's wife, and find the attack is similar to a rape committed the previous week. They discover a locksmith visited both women's houses before the incident, but when they examine the stolen goods found in his toolbox, a new connection emerges - putting another suspect in the frame. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a man is shot outside a gay club, the detectives' investigations lead to his family, where they discover the wife of the dead man has a turbulent past. Forensic testing connects the victim to the filming of a porn movie - but the team does not expect to find out his spouse is also involved in the industry. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team's search for a serial rapist leads to a suspect who as a child was the victim of the same type of crime at the hands of his father - prompting his lawyer to cite genetics as the reason for his actions. Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek star(n)

programme.title: Chicago Justice

programme.desc: Mac witnesses a suspicious exchange of briefcases from his window while recuperating from an injury at home, and the strange goings-on lead to murder. An episode paying homage to Alfred Hitchcock's film Rear Window, starring Gary Sinise, with Claire Forlani(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murderer wages a cyber war on healthcare workers he holds a grudge against. Calling himself Grave Digger, the killer enmeshes Mac in his scheme, claiming there is a bond between them - but the team has an opportunity to foil his plan when he unwittingly reveals the identity of his next target. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Anna Belknap, with Greg Germann (Ally McBeal)(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Jaruszalski and Moralez are embroiled in the murky world of Californian politics while investigating a hit-and-run incident in which a waitress loses her unborn child. Crime drama, starring Corey Stall and Alfred Molina(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: TJ and Winters examine the death of an oil-rig worker who was found on shore, and follow the evidence to a drilling platform off the California coast. programme.desc: A bookmaker is arrested on suspicion of murdering his business partner - and his attorney puts together an unconventional case that effectively turns the whole trial into a political statement. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston(n)

programme.desc: Jessica jets off to attend a prestigious international literary conference in Moscow, where she is soon suspected of espionage. Guest starring David McCallum, with Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles comes to the aid of Liz and Jason Liversidge, a Hull couple in desperate need of help in future-proofing their family home. Not long after getting married and starting a family, Jason was diagnosed with both Fabrys disease, which causes a build-up of poisonous toxins in the body, and Motor Neurone Disease, which drastically reduced his life expectancy. The pair also discovered that Jason would have passed Fabrys disease on to his two daughters, which means that once her husband is gone, Liz will need all the help she can get in managing her children's condition. Nick joins forces with designer Oliver Heath and an army of volunteers to put together a home in which Jason can build meaningful memories with his girls, but one which also gives Liz the best chance of providing for their future needs(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels to Epsom to meet paramedics Sam and Ben Laws, who have two children, one with special needs. The couple already find it hard, working opposite shifts which mean they often don't see each other for days on end - and to make matters worse, they have found their house to be inadequate for their requirements. After a close friend nominates them for the DIY SOS treatment, Nick and the team - bolstered by an army of local tradespeople - turn up to transform it into a home they can enjoy as a family, now and in the future(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team take on their most ambitious project to date and transform a whole street of run-down empty properties in Manchester into homes for veterans. They are joined by the local community, as well as Prince William and Prince Harry, who volunteer their assistance on site. In the first edition of the two-part special, the team builds houses for two former soldiers who fought in Iraq and Afghanistan and are suffering from post traumatic stress disorder. However, with the number of volunteers lacking and the buildings proving to be trickier than expected, the build is becoming the toughest yet(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip

They are joined by experts Phillip Serrell and David Harper, and all are looking for valuables to take to auction in Harrogate. Along the way Tanni tries her hand at glass making, and Jade learns about the man who was a design champion of the region(n)

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong(n)

programme.title: Abducted
programme.desc: Every 12 hours a child in the UK is taken by a parent or family member, with the guardian left behind often going through years of heartache and red tape just to see them again. This documentary follows three parents on emotional and dramatic journeys as they fight their ex-partners through the international courts in a bid to get their children back from foreign countries. With access to a team of child-recovery experts, the film reveals how some parents are taking desperate measures. Narrated by Paul McGann(n)
